calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Management Services.
No appearance by the Defendant: Donald G. Narbone.
Plaintiff's witness: Craig Wardel, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Rental agreement----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Statement of Securtiy Deposit Accounts----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Invoices----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Photographs----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 5 - Statement of Securtiy Deposit Accounts----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Donald G. Narbone.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court, matter is submitted and under submission.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits, to be returned with the Judgment when is ready.
March 4, 2005
Judgment granted as follows: Principal $22,483.95, Interest $3,468.07, Attorney's Fees and Costs pursuant to memo of costs. Total $25,952.02
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Feb-17-2005 Text Ruling
